## What this changes

Brief description of the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Stays **read-only** — no non-GET Graph calls, no write scopes.
- [ ] No secrets, real client IDs, tenant names, or PII added to the repo.
- [ ] Tests added/updated; `pytest -q` passes.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (`README`, `docs/`, or the in-app Help page).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under an "Unreleased" heading.
- [ ] New audit checks include a fixture-based test and (if applicable) a note in `docs/AUDIT_ROADMAP.md`.
